title: Reminder: Naming column IDs updates
excerpt: Please remember that the column ID naming convention has recently changed. You can now predict the column_id based on the column’s title (if it’s 20 characters or less!) If the title exceeds the character limit, the colu…

posts.author: rachelatmonday (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: Please remember that the column ID naming convention has recently changed. You can now predict the column_id based on the column’s title (if it’s 20 characters or less!) If the title exceeds the character limit, the column_id will be randomly generated.
